## Slides: How this material is produced

The editable sources are deliberately kept in Markdown-compatible Quarto files:

- `slides.qmd` contains document metadata and the ordered section includes.
- `slides/` contains the projected sections as separate `.qmd` files.
- `handout.qmd` contains the long-form companion document.
- `handout/` contains the participant-facing handout sections as separate `.qmd` files.
- `_quarto.yml` defines the project and output directory.

Render the complete project with:

```bash
quarto render
```

This creates an HTML handout and Reveal.js slides. Quarto expands the includes in `slides.qmd` into one projected document. Keeping the sources in Git makes changes reviewable and preserves the history of both scientific content and teaching design.
